name: shotnote
description: CLI for syncing screenshots from Photos.app and generating markdown notes with OpenAI vision.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/adapters/photo-source && cp src/adapters/photo-source/export-screenshots.applescript dist/adapters/photo-source/export-screenshots.applescript && cp src/adapters/photo-source/export-smart-screenshots.swift dist/adapters/photo-source/export-smart-screenshots.swift
